modules.module_title: Introduction to HD Makeup & Skin Analysis
Advanced HD & Airbrush Techniques for Different Occasions

questions.question: HD Makeup ka primary purpose kya hai?

options.A: Camera aur high-definition screens par flawless dikhna
options.B: Heavy aur cakey look dena
options.C: Sirf party makeup ke liye use karna

questions.explanation: HD makeup specially designed hota hai taaki high-definition cameras aur screens par skin flawless aur natural dikhe, bina kisi flaws ke.

questions.question: Client ki skin analysis mein sabse pehla step kya hona chahiye?

options.B: Client se uski skin concerns aur routine ke baare mein poochhna

questions.explanation: Skin analysis ka pehla step client ki skin concerns aur current routine ko samajhna hai taaki sahi products aur techniques choose ki ja sakein.

questions.question: Oily skin type ke liye kaunsa primer best suitable hoga?

options.B: Mattefying primer

questions.explanation: Oily skin ke liye mattefying primer oil production ko control karta hai aur makeup ko long-lasting banata hai.

questions.question: Dry skin par makeup application se pehle kya karna sabse zaroori hai?

options.B: Skin ko thoroughly cleanse aur moisturize karna

questions.explanation: Dry skin ko makeup se pehle achhe se cleanse aur hydrate karna zaroori hai taaki makeup smooth apply ho aur patchiness na aaye.

questions.question: Combination skin ki pehchan kya hai?

options.B: Poora face dry hona
options.C: T-zone oily aur cheeks dry ya normal hona

questions.explanation: Combination skin mein T-zone (forehead, nose, chin) oily hoti hai jabki cheeks dry ya normal hote hain.

questions.question: HD makeup mein products lightweight kyon hone chahiye?

options.A: Taaki skin par feel na ho
options.B: Taaki camera par natural aur seamless dikhein
options.D: Taaki kam quantity mein use ho

questions.explanation: Lightweight products HD makeup mein zaroori hain taaki camera par makeup natural, seamless aur non-cakey dikhe.

questions.question: Skin tone aur undertone mein kya difference hai?

options.B: Skin tone surface color hai, undertone skin ke neeche ka hue hai
options.C: Undertone sirf dark skin tones mein hota hai
options.D: Skin tone sirf light skin tones mein hota hai

questions.explanation: Skin tone skin ka surface color hota hai (light, medium, dark), jabki undertone skin ke neeche ka subtle hue hota hai (cool, warm, neutral).

questions.question: HD makeup ke liye kaunsa foundation finish recommend kiya jaata hai?

options.B: Dewy ya natural-looking finish

questions.explanation: HD makeup ke liye natural ya dewy finish wale foundations recommend kiye jaate hain, jo skin par seamlessly blend ho jaate hain aur camera par natural lagte hain.

questions.question: Agar client ki skin par redness hai, toh kaunsa color corrector use karna chahiye?

options.B: Orange corrector

questions.explanation: Green color corrector redness ko neutralize karta hai, kyunki green red ka opposite color wheel par hota hai.

questions.question: Mature skin par makeup karte waqt kin baaton ka dhyaan rakhna chahiye?

options.A: Heavy foundations aur powders use karna
options.B: Hydrating products, light coverage aur fine lines mein settle na hone wale formulas use karna
options.C: Dark aur bold colors use karna

questions.explanation: Mature skin par hydrating products, light coverage aur aise formulas use karne chahiye jo fine lines aur wrinkles mein settle na ho, taaki natural aur youthful look mile.

questions.question: Hyperpigmentation ko conceal karne ke liye kaunsa corrector shade best hai?

options.B: Orange ya Peach corrector

questions.explanation: Orange ya peach correctors dark spots aur hyperpigmentation ko effectively neutralize karte hain, especially medium to dark skin tones par.

questions.question: HD makeup mein flashback se bachne ke liye kya avoid karna chahiye?

options.B: Silica-rich powders

questions.explanation: SPF aur silica-rich powders camera flash mein white cast (flashback) create kar sakte hain. HD makeup ke liye inka minimal use ya avoid karna better hai.

questions.question: Client consultation mein skin allergy ke baare mein poochhna kyon important hai?

options.B: Taaki unki pasand ka product use na karein
options.C: Potential allergic reactions se bachne aur client safety ke liye

questions.explanation: Allergy history poochhna client ki safety ke liye crucial hai, taaki aise products avoid kiye ja sakein jo reaction cause kar sakte hain.

questions.question: Normal skin type ke liye makeup routine mein kya dhyaan rakhna chahiye?

options.B: Balance maintain karna, hydrating aur oil-controlling products ka mix

questions.explanation: Normal skin type ke liye balance maintain karna zaroori hai, jismein hydrating aur oil-controlling products ka mix ho taaki skin healthy aur balanced rahe.

questions.question: Ek makeup artist ko client ki skin analysis ke baad kya recommend karna chahiye, agar client ki skin extremely dehydrated hai?

options.B: Water-based hydrating primer aur dewy foundation

questions.explanation: Extremely dehydrated skin ke liye hydrating primer aur dewy finish foundation recommend karna chahiye, jo skin ko moisture de aur makeup ko smooth look de.

questions.question: HD makeup products mein micro-fine pigments ka kya role hai?

options.B: Skin par seamless aur natural blend dena, bina pores ko highlight kiye

questions.explanation: Micro-fine pigments skin par seamlessly blend hote hain, pores ko highlight nahi karte aur natural, flawless look dete hain jo HD cameras par bhi achha dikhta hai.

questions.question: Agar client ki skin sensitive hai aur red patches hain, toh aap konsa pre-makeup step suggest karenge?

options.B: Alcohol-based toner
options.C: Soothing, fragrance-free moisturizer aur green color corrector

questions.explanation: Sensitive skin ko soothe karne aur redness ko neutralize karne ke liye fragrance-free moisturizer aur green color corrector ka use karna sabse best approach hai.

questions.question: HD foundation apply karne ka best method kya hai?

options.B: Dabbing motion mein beauty blender ya brush se blend karna

questions.explanation: Dabbing motion mein beauty blender ya brush se foundation apply karne se seamless aur natural finish milta hai, jo HD makeup ke liye ideal hai.

questions.question: Concealer ko kis area par apply karna chahiye?

options.A: Poore face par foundation ki tarah
options.B: Dark circles, blemishes aur redness jaise targeted areas par

questions.explanation: Concealer ka use specific areas jaise dark circles, blemishes aur redness ko cover karne ke liye kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Contouring ka main purpose kya hai?

options.B: Face ko sculpt aur define karna, features ko enhance karna
options.D: Poore face par ek hi shade lagana

questions.explanation: Contouring se face ko sculpt aur define kiya jaata hai, jisse features aur facial structure enhance hoti hai.

questions.question: Highlighting products ko face ke kin parts par apply kiya jaata hai?

options.B: Face ke high points par jaise cheekbones, brow bone, nose bridge

questions.explanation: Highlighting products face ke high points par apply kiye jaate hain, jo light ko catch karte hain aur glow dete hain.

questions.question: Setting powder ka kya role hai HD makeup mein?

options.B: Makeup ko set karna, long-lasting banana aur shine control karna

questions.explanation: Setting powder makeup ko set karta hai, uski longevity badhata hai aur excessive shine ko control karta hai.

questions.question: HD makeup ke liye kaunse brushes prefer kiye jaate hain?

options.B: Soft, dense aur synthetic bristles wale brushes

questions.explanation: HD makeup ke liye soft, dense aur synthetic bristles wale brushes prefer kiye jaate hain, kyunki ye liquid aur cream products ko smoothly blend karte hain.

questions.question: HD makeup mein baking technique ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Makeup ko oven mein bake karna
options.B: Loose setting powder ko thick layer mein apply karna, thodi der chhodna aur phir dust off karna

questions.explanation: Baking technique mein loose setting powder ko thick layer mein apply karke, thodi der ke liye skin ki natural heat se set hone diya jaata hai, phir excess powder ko dust off kar diya jaata hai. Ye makeup ko set aur crease-proof banata hai.

questions.question: Agar client ko natural-looking eyebrows chahiye, toh kaunsi product category use karni chahiye?

options.B: Eyebrow pencil ya powder jo hair-like strokes create kare

questions.explanation: Natural-looking eyebrows ke liye eyebrow pencil ya powder use karna chahiye jo hair-like strokes create kar sake aur brows ko softly define kare.

questions.question: Color correcting palette mein purple corrector ka kya use hai?

options.B: Dullness aur yellow undertones ko brighten karna

questions.explanation: Purple corrector dullness aur yellowish undertones ko neutralize karke skin ko brighten karta hai.

questions.question: HD makeup ke liye lipstick choose karte waqt kya dhyaan rakhna chahiye?

options.B: Long-lasting, comfortable aur non-drying formula

questions.explanation: HD makeup mein lipstick long-lasting, comfortable aur non-drying honi chahiye, taaki camera par lips fresh aur hydrated dikhein.

questions.question: Cream products ko powder products se pehle kyon apply karna chahiye?

options.A: Taaki cream products dry ho jayein
options.B: Taaki powder products smoothly blend ho sakein aur cakey na lagein
options.D: Sirf cream products use karne chahiye

questions.explanation: Cream products ko powder products se pehle apply karne se powder smoothly set hota hai aur cakey finish nahi aata. Powder cream ko set karta hai.

questions.question: Setting spray ka HD makeup mein kya importance hai?

options.B: Makeup ko lock karna, longevity badhana aur natural finish dena

questions.explanation: Setting spray makeup ko lock karta hai, uski longevity badhata hai aur powdery finish ko set karke natural look deta hai.

questions.question: Waterproof mascara use karne ka kya benefit hai?

options.B: Smudging, flaking aur running se bachata hai, especially in humid conditions

questions.explanation: Waterproof mascara smudging, flaking aur running se bachata hai, jo humid conditions ya emotional events ke liye ideal hai.

questions.question: Agar client ko prominent pores ki problem hai, toh aap HD foundation se pehle kaunsa product suggest karenge?

options.B: Pore-filling primer

questions.explanation: Pore-filling primer pores ko blur karta hai aur foundation ke liye smooth canvas provide karta hai, jisse pores HD camera par kam visible hote hain.

questions.question: HD makeup mein colour correcting aur concealing ke beech kya sequence honi chahiye?

options.B: Pehle corrector, phir concealer
options.C: Dono ko mix karke apply karna

questions.explanation: Pehle color corrector apply kiya jaata hai taaki discoloration neutralize ho, phir uske upar concealer apply kiya jaata hai taaki seamless coverage mile.

questions.question: HD makeup ke liye blush ka konsa formula sabse suitable hai?

options.B: Cream ya liquid blush jo easily blend ho

questions.explanation: Cream ya liquid blush HD makeup ke liye best hain kyunki ye skin par seamlessly blend hote hain aur natural, dewy finish dete hain, jo camera par achha dikhta hai.

questions.question: Brow lamination technique ka kya purpose hai?

options.B: Brows ko temporary shape dena, unhe fuller aur defined dikhana

questions.explanation: Brow lamination ek semi-permanent treatment hai jo brows ko set aur lift karta hai, unhe fuller aur well-groomed look deta hai.

questions.question: Airbrush makeup mein 'compressor' ka kya kaam hai?

options.B: Airbrush gun mein air pressure supply karna

questions.explanation: Compressor airbrush gun ko constant air pressure provide karta hai, jisse makeup spray hota hai.

questions.question: Airbrush gun ke 'trigger' ka kya function hai?

options.B: Sirf makeup release karna
options.C: Air aur makeup dono ka flow control karna

questions.explanation: Airbrush gun ka trigger air aur makeup dono ke flow ko control karta hai, jisse precise application possible hoti hai.

questions.question: Airbrush makeup ke liye kaunsa type ka foundation use hota hai?

options.B: Water-based ya silicone-based liquid foundation

questions.explanation: Airbrush makeup ke liye water-based ya silicone-based liquid foundations use hote hain, jo thin consistency ke hote hain aur gun se smoothly spray hote hain.

questions.question: Airbrush gun ki proper cleaning kyon zaroori hai?

options.A: Sirf uski appearance achhi rakhne ke liye
options.B: Clogging se bachne aur smooth operation ke liye
options.C: Makeup ko dry karne ke liye
options.D: Extra makeup store karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Proper cleaning clogging ko prevent karti hai aur airbrush gun ke smooth aur effective operation ko ensure karti hai.

questions.question: Airbrush makeup traditional makeup se kaise different hai?

options.B: Ye spray application method use karta hai aur lighter feel deta hai
options.C: Isme brushes ki zaroorat hoti hai
options.D: Ye sirf dark skin tones ke liye hai

questions.explanation: Airbrush makeup spray application method use karta hai, jisse ek lightweight, flawless aur seamless finish milta hai, jo traditional makeup se alag hai.

questions.question: Airbrush makeup kit mein 'air hose' ka kya function hai?

options.B: Compressor se airbrush gun tak air transmit karna

questions.explanation: Air hose compressor ko airbrush gun se connect karta hai aur air flow ko gun tak pahunchata hai.

questions.question: Airbrush gun ke 'needle' ka kya role hai?

options.B: Makeup flow ko regulate karna aur spray pattern ko control karna

questions.explanation: Needle airbrush gun mein makeup flow aur spray pattern ko regulate karti hai, jisse fine lines se broad coverage tak control milta hai.

questions.question: Airbrush makeup ke liye 'silicone-based' formulations kyon prefer kiye jaate hain?

options.A: Ye skin ko dry karte hain
options.B: Ye long-lasting, water-resistant aur smooth finish dete hain
options.C: Ye pores ko clog karte hain
options.D: Ye sirf temporary coverage dete hain

questions.explanation: Silicone-based airbrush foundations apni longevity, water-resistance aur smooth, natural finish ke liye jane jaate hain.

questions.question: Airbrush gun mein 'cup' ka kya purpose hai?

options.B: Makeup solution ko hold karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Airbrush gun ka cup woh part hai jahan makeup solution daala jaata hai spray karne se pehle.

questions.question: Compressor ki 'PSI' setting ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Air pressure ki intensity

questions.explanation: PSI (Pounds per Square Inch) air compressor se nikalne wale air pressure ki intensity ko indicate karta hai, jo makeup application ko directly affect karta hai.

questions.question: Airbrush makeup mein 'water-based' formulations ka kya benefit hai?

options.A: Ye skin ko waterproof banate hain
options.B: Ye lightweight hote hain, breathable aur easy to remove hote hain
options.D: Ye pores ko clog karte hain

questions.explanation: Water-based airbrush foundations lightweight, breathable hote hain aur natural finish dete hain. Ye oily aur sensitive skin ke liye acche hote hain.

questions.question: Airbrush gun ke 'nozzle' ka kya function hai?

options.B: Makeup ko fine mist mein atomize karna

questions.explanation: Nozzle makeup ko fine mist mein convert karti hai jab air usse guzarti hai, jisse smooth aur even application hoti hai.

questions.question: Airbrush gun ko disassemble karte waqt kin parts ka dhyaan rakhna chahiye?

options.B: Needle, nozzle aur tip jaise delicate parts ka

questions.explanation: Airbrush gun ko disassemble karte waqt needle, nozzle aur tip jaise delicate parts ka khaas dhyaan rakhna chahiye, kyunki ye easily damage ho sakte hain.

questions.question: Agar airbrush gun se makeup sputter ho raha hai ya uneven spray ho raha hai, toh kya problem ho sakti hai?

options.B: Clogging, improper pressure setting ya damaged needle/nozzle

questions.explanation: Sputtering ya uneven spray clogging, galat air pressure setting ya damaged needle/nozzle ke kaaran ho sakta hai. Troubleshooting ke liye in sab ko check karna chahiye.

questions.question: Mini compressor aur professional studio compressor mein kya difference hai?

options.B: Mini compressor portable aur low power hota hai, professional compressor high power, stable aur continuous use ke liye hota hai
options.C: Mini compressor sirf water-based makeup ke liye hai
options.D: Professional compressor sirf silicone-based makeup ke liye hai

questions.explanation: Mini compressors portable aur kam power ke hote hain, jo personal ya light use ke liye acche hain. Professional studio compressors zyada powerful, stable aur continuous, high-volume work ke liye design kiye jaate hain.

questions.question: Airbrush makeup mein 'back-bubbling' technique ka kya use hai?

options.A: Makeup ko cup mein mix karna
options.B: Gun ko clean karna

questions.explanation: Back-bubbling technique mein air ko makeup cup mein reverse flow kiya jaata hai, jisse makeup achhe se mix ho jaata hai aur consistency maintain rehti hai.

questions.question: Airbrush foundation apply karte waqt gun ko face se kitni door rakhna chahiye?

options.B: Bahut kareeb (1 inch)

questions.explanation: Airbrush gun ko face se 6-8 inches ki doori par rakhne se even aur smooth coverage milti hai, bina patchiness ke.

questions.question: Airbrush makeup mein 'light, even strokes' ka kya importance hai?

options.B: Patchy aur heavy application se bachne ke liye

questions.explanation: Light, even strokes se makeup smoothly apply hota hai aur patchy ya heavy look nahi aata. Isse buildable coverage bhi milti hai.

questions.question: Airbrush blush apply karte waqt kya dhyaan rakhna chahiye?

options.A: Sirf cheeks ke center par spray karna
options.B: Light hand se, apple of the cheeks par blend karte hue apply karna

questions.explanation: Airbrush blush ko light hand se apple of the cheeks par blend karte hue apply karna chahiye taaki natural flush mile.

questions.question: Airbrush eyeshadow ke liye kya precaution leni chahiye?

options.B: Eyes ko protect karne ke liye shields ya cotton pads use karna

questions.explanation: Airbrush eyeshadow apply karte waqt eyes ko protect karne ke liye shields ya cotton pads use karna zaroori hai taaki makeup eyes mein na jaye.

questions.question: Airbrush body makeup kyon use hota hai?

options.A: Sirf tattoo cover karne ke liye
options.B: Even skin tone, cover imperfections aur glow dene ke liye
options.C: Sirf arms par lagane ke liye
options.D: Body ko dry karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Airbrush body makeup skin tone ko even karta hai, imperfections ko cover karta hai aur body ko natural glow deta hai, especially for photoshoots ya events.

questions.question: Airbrush makeup mein 'stenciling' technique ka kya use hai?

options.A: Poore face par makeup apply karna
options.B: Detailed designs, eyebrows ya precise lines create karna

questions.explanation: Stenciling technique ka use detailed designs, eyebrows ko shape dene ya precise lines create karne ke liye kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Agar airbrush foundation bahut zyada opaque lag raha hai, toh kya adjust karna chahiye?

options.B: Makeup ki quantity kam karna ya gun ko thoda door rakhna

questions.explanation: Opaque ya heavy application ko avoid karne ke liye makeup ki quantity kam karni chahiye ya gun ko face se thodi door rakhna chahiye, aur light layers mein apply karna chahiye.

questions.question: Airbrush contouring karte waqt kya technique use karni chahiye?

options.B: Precise lines create karna aur light hand se blend karna

questions.explanation: Airbrush contouring mein precise lines create karke unhe light hand se blend karna chahiye taaki natural-looking shadows ban sakein.

questions.question: Airbrush makeup ke baad setting powder ki zaroorat padti hai kya?

options.B: Rarely, kyunki airbrush makeup khud hi set ho jaata hai

questions.explanation: Airbrush makeup generally self-setting hota hai aur usse powder ki zaroorat nahi padti. Agar bahut oily skin ho toh light dusting kar sakte hain.

questions.question: Airbrush makeup mein 'dotting' technique ka kya purpose hai?

options.B: Targeted coverage ya spot concealing ke liye

questions.explanation: Dotting technique ka use targeted coverage ya spot concealing ke liye kiya jaata hai, jahan specific areas par precise application ki zaroorat hoti hai.

questions.question: Airbrush makeup apply karte waqt client ko kya instructions deni chahiye?

options.A: Baar baar hilte rehne ke liye
options.B: Eyes close rakhne aur still rehne ke liye
options.D: Apne face ko touch karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Client ko eyes close rakhne aur still rehne ke liye instruct karna zaroori hai taaki makeup evenly apply ho aur eyes mein na jaye.

questions.question: Agar airbrush gun se makeup continuous flow nahi ho raha hai, toh kya check karna chahiye?

options.B: Makeup ki consistency, clogging, air pressure aur gun assembly

questions.explanation: Continuous flow na hone par makeup ki consistency (bahut thick toh nahi), gun mein clogging, air pressure setting aur gun ki proper assembly check karni chahiye.

questions.question: Airbrush makeup se 'highlighting' kaise achieve kiya jaata hai?

options.B: Light, shimmery shade ko face ke high points par spray karke

questions.explanation: Airbrush highlighting mein light, shimmery shade ko face ke high points (cheekbones, brow bone) par delicately spray kiya jaata hai taaki natural glow mile.

questions.question: Airbrush makeup application mein 'layering' technique kyon important hai?

options.A: Makeup ko cakey banane ke liye
options.B: Buildable coverage achieve karne aur natural finish maintain karne ke liye
options.C: Sirf ek hi layer apply karne ke liye
options.D: Makeup ko jaldi dry karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Layering technique se makeup ko thin layers mein apply kiya jaata hai, jisse buildable coverage milti hai aur natural, non-heavy finish maintain rehta hai.

questions.question: Airbrush makeup se 'freckles' ya 'beauty marks' kaise create kiye jaate hain?

options.B: Bahut low air pressure par specific dark shade ko micro-dots mein apply karke

questions.explanation: Freckles ya beauty marks create karne ke liye bahut low air pressure par ek dark shade ko micro-dots mein apply kiya jaata hai, jisse natural-looking effect milta hai.

questions.question: Airbrush makeup application mein 'distance' ka kya impact hota hai?

options.B: Distance kam hone par concentrated aur zyada coverage, zyada hone par diffused aur lighter coverage
options.C: Distance sirf air pressure ko adjust karta hai
options.D: Distance sirf makeup ki quantity ko adjust karta hai

questions.explanation: Airbrush gun aur skin ke beech ki distance bahut important hai. Kareeb hone par zyada concentrated aur coverage milti hai, door hone par diffused aur lighter coverage.

questions.question: Airbrush makeup se temporary tattoo kaise apply kiya jaata hai?

options.B: Stencil ka use karke aur airbrush gun se special tattoo ink spray karke

questions.explanation: Temporary tattoos apply karne ke liye stencils ka use kiya jaata hai, aur airbrush gun se special temporary tattoo ink spray ki jaati hai.

questions.question: Bridal HD makeup mein sabse important factor kya hai?

options.B: Long-lasting, tear-proof aur flawless finish jo photos aur videos mein achha dikhe

questions.explanation: Bridal HD makeup long-lasting, tear-proof aur flawless hona chahiye taaki bride poore event mein stunning dikhe aur photos/videos mein bhi perfect lage.

questions.question: Editorial makeup ka main goal kya hota hai?

options.B: Artistic, conceptual aur high-fashion look create karna magazines ya photoshoots ke liye

questions.explanation: Editorial makeup artistic aur conceptual hota hai, jo high-fashion magazines ya photoshoots ke liye bold aur creative looks create karta hai.

questions.question: Ramp makeup mein kya dhyaan rakhna chahiye?

options.B: Dramatic, visible aur runway lights mein standing out look dena

questions.explanation: Ramp makeup dramatic aur visible hona chahiye, jo runway lights mein bhi models ke features ko enhance kare aur crowd se dikhe.

questions.question: Special effects (SFX) makeup mein airbrush technique ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Realistic skin textures, wounds aur character details create karna

questions.explanation: Airbrush technique SFX makeup mein realistic skin textures, wounds, bruises aur character details create karne ke liye bahut effective hai.

questions.question: Long-lasting makeup ke liye kaunsa product sabse essential hai?

options.B: Primer aur setting spray

questions.explanation: Primer aur setting spray makeup ki longevity badhane aur use set karne ke liye essential hain, jisse makeup long-lasting banta hai.

questions.question: Bridal makeup trial kyon zaroori hai?

options.B: Bride ki preferences samajhne, look finalize karne aur adjustments karne ke liye
options.D: Makeup artist ki practice ke liye

questions.explanation: Bridal makeup trial se bride ki preferences samajh aati hain, look finalize hota hai aur wedding day par koi surprise nahi hota.

questions.question: HD makeup technique se 'no-makeup' makeup look kaise achieve kiya jaata hai?

options.B: Lightweight products, minimal coverage aur seamless blending se natural skin enhance karna

questions.explanation: No-makeup makeup look mein lightweight products, minimal coverage aur seamless blending ka use kiya jaata hai taaki skin naturally enhanced dikhe, jaise koi makeup nahi hai.

questions.question: Agar client ko 'smokey eye' chahiye, toh kaunse colors ka combination best rahega?

options.B: Black, grey aur brown shades ko blend karna

questions.explanation: Smokey eye look ke liye black, grey aur brown shades ko achhe se blend karna best rehta hai, jisse depth aur definition milti hai.

questions.question: Glamour makeup mein kaunse elements prominent hote hain?

options.B: Bold eyes, defined brows, flawless skin aur often dramatic lips

questions.explanation: Glamour makeup mein bold eyes, defined brows, flawless skin aur dramatic lips jaise elements prominent hote hain, jo ek sophisticated aur attractive look dete hain.

questions.question: Fantasy makeup mein airbrush ka kya role hai?

options.B: Intricate designs, body paint aur gradient effects create karna

questions.explanation: Fantasy makeup mein airbrush intricate designs, body paint aur seamless gradient effects create karne ke liye use hota hai, jo fantastical characters ko life dete hain.

questions.question: Mature skin ke liye HD makeup mein kya specific considerations hain?

options.A: Heavy matte foundation aur powder use karna
options.B: Hydrating, light-reflecting products, avoiding heavy powder aur emphasis on skin prep

questions.explanation: Mature skin ke liye hydrating, light-reflecting products aur thorough skin prep zaroori hai. Heavy powders aur matte products fine lines ko highlight kar sakte hain.

questions.question: Outdoor photoshoot ke liye HD makeup mein kya extra precaution leni chahiye?

options.B: Sweat-proof, long-wearing formulas aur SPF ka dhyaan rakhna

questions.explanation: Outdoor photoshoots ke liye sweat-proof, long-wearing formulas aur SPF wale products use karna chahiye taaki makeup weather conditions mein bhi intact rahe.

questions.question: Halloween makeup mein airbrush technique ka use kaise hota hai?

options.B: Quickly create complex designs, fades aur realistic textures

questions.explanation: Halloween makeup mein airbrush se quickly complex designs, fades aur realistic textures (jaise zombie skin ya animal fur) create kiye ja sakte hain.

questions.question: Black & White photography ke liye HD makeup mein kya considerations hain?

options.B: Contrast, light-dark values aur flawless skin tone par focus karna, colors ki jagah tones par dhyaan dena
options.D: Sirf natural light mein makeup karna

questions.explanation: Black & White photography mein colors ka effect nahi hota, isliye contrast, light-dark values aur flawless skin tone par focus karna chahiye taaki features define ho sakein.

questions.question: Bridal HD makeup mein 'waterproofing' kitni important hai aur kyon?

options.B: Bahut important hai, taaki tears, sweat aur humidity se makeup intact rahe

questions.explanation: Bridal makeup mein waterproofing bahut important hai taaki bride ke tears (khushi ke), sweat aur humidity se makeup intact rahe aur flawless dikhe.

questions.question: Agar client ko 'dramatic cut crease' look chahiye, toh airbrush makeup kaise help karega?

options.A: Cut crease banane mein help nahi karega
options.B: Sharp, precise lines aur smooth color transitions banane mein help karega

questions.explanation: Airbrush makeup sharp, precise cut crease lines banane aur colors ke beech smooth transitions create karne mein help karta hai, jo dramatic look ke liye essential hai.

questions.question: Male grooming ke liye HD aur Airbrush techniques ka kya use hai?

options.B: Natural-looking skin correction, redness cover karna aur shine control karna

questions.explanation: Male grooming mein HD aur Airbrush techniques se natural-looking skin correction, redness cover karna aur shine control karna possible hai, jo ek clean aur polished look deta hai.

questions.question: Makeup artist ko apne brushes aur tools ko kab clean karna chahiye?

options.B: Har client ke baad

questions.explanation: Cross-contamination se bachne aur hygiene maintain karne ke liye har client ke baad brushes aur tools ko clean aur sanitize karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Makeup products ko store karne ka best tareeka kya hai?

options.B: Cool, dry place par, airtight containers mein

questions.explanation: Products ko cool, dry place par aur airtight containers mein store karne se unki shelf life badhti hai aur contamination se bachav hota hai.

questions.question: Client consultation mein 'patch test' kyon important hai?

options.B: Allergic reactions check karne ke liye
options.C: Makeup artist ki skills dikhane ke liye

questions.explanation: Patch test se client ko kisi product se allergy hai ya nahi, ye pata chalta hai, jisse serious reactions se bacha ja sakta hai.

questions.question: Makeup artist ko apni workstation ko kaise maintain karna chahiye?

options.B: Clean, organized aur sanitized

questions.explanation: Clean aur organized workstation hygiene maintain karne aur professional image banane ke liye essential hai.

questions.question: Makeup artist ko apne portfolio mein kya include karna chahiye?

options.B: High-quality photos of diverse makeup looks and client testimonials

questions.explanation: Ek strong portfolio mein high-quality photos, diverse makeup looks aur client testimonials hone chahiye, jo artist ka skill aur experience dikhayein.

questions.question: Client feedback kyon important hai?

options.B: Services ko improve karne aur future clients ke liye trust build karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Client feedback services ko improve karne aur naye clients ke liye trust aur credibility build karne mein help karta hai.

questions.question: Makeup artist ko apne services ki pricing kaise set karni chahiye?

options.B: Experience, skill set, product cost, market rates aur time ke hisab se
options.C: Sirf competitor ki pricing dekh kar

questions.explanation: Pricing set karte waqt experience, skill set, product cost, market rates aur time investment ko consider karna chahiye taaki fair aur profitable rates mil sakein.

questions.question: Cross-contamination se bachne ke liye kya precaution leni chahiye?

options.A: Ek hi brush sab clients par use karna
options.B: Disposable applicators, separate palettes use karna aur hands sanitize karna

questions.explanation: Disposable applicators, separate palettes ka use aur regular hand sanitization cross-contamination ko rokne ke liye crucial hain.

questions.question: Makeup artist ke liye 'time management' kyon important hai?

options.A: Sirf jaldi kaam khatam karne ke liye
options.B: Appointments ko smoothly manage karne aur client satisfaction ke liye
options.C: Client ko wait karwane ke liye

questions.explanation: Effective time management se appointments smoothly run hote hain, client satisfaction badhti hai aur artist professional lagta hai.

questions.question: Ek professional makeup artist ko apne clients ke saath kaise interact karna chahiye?

options.B: Polite, empathetic aur attentive, unki needs ko samajhte hue

questions.explanation: Polite, empathetic aur attentive interaction se client comfortable feel karta hai aur artist unki needs ko behtar samajh pata hai.

questions.question: Makeup artist ke liye social media marketing ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Portfolio showcase karna, naye clients attract karna aur brand visibility badhana

questions.explanation: Social media marketing se portfolio showcase hota hai, naye clients attract hote hain aur artist ki brand visibility badhti hai.

questions.question: Agar client ko makeup application ke dauraan irritation ya discomfort ho, toh makeup artist ko kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Immediately application rokna, reason poochhna aur adjust karna

questions.explanation: Client ki comfort aur safety paramount hai. Irritation hone par immediately application rokna, reason samajhna aur accordingly adjust karna chahiye.

questions.question: Makeup artist ke liye 'continuous learning' kyon important hai?

options.A: Sirf certifications collect karne ke liye
options.B: Naye trends, techniques aur products se updated rehne aur skills enhance karne ke liye
options.C: Sirf apne competitors ko copy karne ke liye
options.D: Ek hi technique par stick rehne ke liye

questions.explanation: Beauty industry constantly evolve karti rehti hai, isliye naye trends, techniques aur products se updated rehna aur apni skills ko enhance karna bahut zaroori hai.

questions.question: Client agreement ya contract mein kya details include honi chahiye?

options.B: Service details, pricing, payment terms, cancellation policy aur liability clauses

questions.explanation: Client agreement mein service details, pricing, payment terms, cancellation policy aur liability clauses honi chahiye taaki dono parties ke expectations clear hon aur disputes se bacha ja sake.

questions.question: Makeup artist ko emergency situations (jaise client ka faint hona) ke liye kaise prepared rehna chahiye?

options.B: Basic first aid knowledge hona aur emergency contacts ready rakhna

questions.explanation: Basic first aid knowledge aur emergency contacts ready rakhna kisi bhi unforeseen situation ko handle karne ke liye crucial hai, jo client ki safety ensure karta hai.

questions.question: Apni professional reputation build karne ke liye ek makeup artist ko kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Consistent quality work, excellent client service aur strong professional ethics maintain karna

questions.explanation: Consistent quality work, excellent client service aur strong professional ethics maintain karna ek makeup artist ke liye apni reputation build karne ka sabse effective tareeka hai.
